title: Sour Crispy Kenyana Flour Crame
description: A monsoon-inspired sour and crispy flour crumble dish that's perfect for a quick snack or breakfast.

ingredients.name: Apple Juice Concentrate (or Fresh Apple Juice)
Raw Cacao Powder (optional for extra sourness)

instructions: Mix Kenyana Flour, baking powder, and salt in a mixing bowl.
Add raw honey or agave syrup, apple juice concentrate, and melted coconut oil to the dry ingredients. Mix well until no lumps remain.
Gradually add almond milk while continuing to mix until you get a smooth batter-like consistency.
If desired, stir in some Raw Cacao Powder for extra sourness and flavoring.
Spray a baking sheet with cooking spray or line it with parchment paper. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and spread evenly using a spatula.
Bake at 150°C (300°F) for about 40-45 minutes, or until golden brown on top and crispy inside.
